title: Kumagurashi
titleNative: くまぐらし
synopsis: Kumada is an office worker who lives his life by avoiding all kinds of risks: "If you're prepared, there's no need to worry.'' "Better safe than sorry'' "A gentleman does not approach danger." One day, a bear suddenly appears in his house as he is enjoying his bachelor lifestyle. It's also a mysterious bear who does housework...!?

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

title: Lazy Girl Momogusa
titleNative: 桃草さんがものぐさすぎる!!
synopsis: Souji Hataki is an ordinary high school boy who has just landed the perfect new part-time job as a housekeeper for the house of Momogusa. What’s so significant about that? It just so happens to be the home of the most beautiful girl in school! Perfect, pretty, and popular, Momogusa-san is amazing at everything she does and now Hataki will have a chance to see her in her element. But, he quickly learns something shocking: Momogusa is incredibly lazy at home! The moment she’s home from school, she seems to transform into a totally different version of herself and even expects to be pampered! Somehow she grows fond of Hataki and even begins to let him pamper her. Could this be the start of some sort of relationship or is Hataki just a glorified manservant? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

The key to survive on the island is the Kai's Cheat ability to summon a different world's item that Kai only used in. With this ability Kai build a "Pioneering Village". Kai's survival & the fate of the national life! It is a different world ability that only you can enter, cute girls and survival life!

title: Kimi no Negai ga Kanau Made
titleRomaji: Kimi no Negai ga Kanau Made
titleNative: きみの願いが叶うまで
synopsis: For his high school debut, Minto Shishidou pretended to be an outgoing playboy, spinning lies about the girlfriends he goes through. This corner he backed himself into weighs heavily on his mind when he joins a school trip, and he’s determined to use the occasion to get a girlfriend for real. But then an unimaginable incident strikes him and his classmates, setting the stage for a locked-room love comedy centered around the wishes of these boys and girls. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Replica: Revenge of the Ex-Wife
titleNative: レプリカ 元妻の復讐
synopsis: Aoi grew up constantly being made fun of and bullied for her appearance. After going through one bad experience after the other in school, she finally gets to marry the man of her dreams who loves her for who she is. However, he too eventually seeks out someone better-looking and cheats on her, resulting in their divorce. Oddly enough though... the woman he cheated on Aoi with is the same girl who bullied her throughout their school years...! Now Aoi's on a mission to get revenge on the man who cheated on her who is now married to the woman who made her life miserable. She has her face reshaped, her name changed to Sumire, and slowly begins to find her way into their lives... (Source: MangaPlaza)
searchTerms: レプリカ 元妻の復讐

title: BE-BOP-HIGHSCHOOL
titleNative: BE-BOP-HIGHSCHOOL
synonyms: ビーバップハイスクール
ビー・バップ・ハイスクール
synopsis: The story revolves around the lives of two rough-and-tumble high school friends, Hiroshi Kato and Toru Nakama, who frequently cause trouble and start fights. In keeping with the spirit of the manga, Toru and Hiroshi style their hair in punch perms and also adopt exaggerated swaggering gaits. The manga also features an assortment of outlandish characters who also sport unusual fashions and hairdos. (Source: Wikipedia) Note: Won the 12th Kodansha Manga Award for general manga in 1988.

title: Imouto wa Shitteiru
titleNative: 妹は知っている
synopsis: At work, Kiichiro Miki is an ordinary salaryman who is considered expressionless and dull by his co-workers. He floats around at drinking parties and doesn't seem to be having any fun at all. But only I, his younger sister, knows the truth about him. My brother is actually “the most interesting man in the world." (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Tsuihou Sareta S-kyuu Kanteishi wa Saikyou no Guild wo Tsukuru
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Sareta S-kyuu Kanteishi wa Saikyou no Guild wo Tsukuru
titleNative: 追放されたS級鑑定士は最強のギルドを創る
synopsis: Appraiser Laurent was kicked out from his guild "Golden Hawk." It was a result of one-sided jealousy from the guild leader, Lucius. Feeling hurt and crushed by the sudden dismissal, a female mage named Lilianne gave him a helping hand. Together with her, he decided to create a new guild to mess with Lucius. Eventually, those talents that Laurent found through his appraisal skill will create the strongest guild. (Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

titleNative: 史上最強の弟子ケンイチ
synopsis: The story is focused on Kenichi Shirahama, an average 15-year-old weakling, whose life turns to Hell with the appearance of the naive, beautiful, and strong transfer student, Miu Fūrinji. After Kenichi witnesses Miu's skills in martial arts, he joins the Ryōza

title: How My Cute Girlfriend and I Started a Love Story
titleRomaji: Watashi to Kanojo no Kawaii Koi no Hajimekata
titleEnglish: How My Cute Girlfriend and I Started a Love Story
titleNative: 私と彼女のかわいい恋のはじめ方
synonyms: How to Start a Cute Love Between Me and my Girlfriend
synopsis: Yoshiko Yokozawa is an office lady who loves cute things and being cute herself. Because of this, she is often not taken seriously and she is fed up with it. On the other hand, Chiaki Kurisu, a sales representative from a trading company, always seems very serious when she visits for business. For some reason, Kurisu suddenly invites Yokozawa to dinner!? Outside of work, Kurisu-san is completely different from her usual business-like behavior, being totally open and vulnerable...!? “This woman, is cuter than me!?” You can’t help but fall for her. ♡ Adult girls-love ♡ (Source: Kodansha, translated) Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

titleNative: パーマン
synopsis: From Birdman, a superman from space, he received a mysterious mask and cape. Wearing these, even a slightly clumsy elementary student can transform into Perman, a hero of justice! Rescue the weak, thwart the evil. Together with his three friends, Perman does his best every day to protect peace on Earth

title: Sacchi Sarenai Rule Breaker
titleNative: 察知されない最強職 (ルール・ブレイカー)
synonyms: The Undetectable Strongest Job: Rule Breaker
synopsis: By some ill fortune, Hikaru died in a traffic accident. He was in heaven standing in line, waiting to be judged, when he took an unexpected request to transfer his soul into a person in another world. He received an ability called Soul Board which he could use to allocate points to Skills to make himself more powerful. But there was a catch… "I want you to take revenge on someone for me within an hour. If you don’t, I’ll destroy your soul." To pull off the task assigned to him, he poured all his available points to the Stealth skill tree. This is a story of a boy who specialised in Stealth. With his skill trees as weapons, he would demonstrate his unrivalled strength in another world.

titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる

Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
titleNative: 田中家、転生する。
synopsis: An ordinary family that loves cats. One day, the whole Tanaka family died during a major earthquake. When they woke up, they were reincarnated as the Stuart family, a noble family from another world. Though everyone is dressed in the Western style, they have memories of their previous Japanese lives. Even though they’re confused, they’ve gotten used to living in another world.
